module_info.docstring:
Security Input Sanitization Tests.

Comprehensive tests for input sanitization and security measures:
1. FTS query sanitization
2. SQL injection prevention
3. Path traversal prevention
4. XSS prevention
5. Unicode/encoding attack prevention
6. Null byte injection prevention
7. Large input handling (DoS prevention)

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-yh8

methods.name: test_sanitize_empty_query
methods.docstring: Empty query returns None.

methods.name: test_sanitize_bare_wildcard
methods.docstring: Bare wildcards return None.

methods.name: test_sanitize_bare_dots
methods.docstring: Bare dots return None.

methods.name: test_sanitize_bare_question_marks
methods.docstring: Bare question marks return None.

methods.name: test_sanitize_bare_boolean_operators
methods.docstring: Bare boolean operators return None.

methods.name: test_sanitize_leading_wildcard
methods.docstring: Leading wildcards are stripped.

methods.name: test_sanitize_trailing_lone_asterisk
methods.docstring: Trailing lone asterisks are stripped.

methods.name: test_sanitize_valid_prefix_pattern
methods.docstring: Valid prefix patterns are preserved.

methods.name: test_sanitize_multiple_spaces
methods.docstring: Multiple spaces are normalized to single space.

methods.name: test_sanitize_normal_query
methods.docstring: Normal queries are preserved.

methods.name: test_sanitize_boolean_with_terms
methods.docstring: Boolean operators with terms are preserved.

methods.name: test_sanitize_quoted_phrases
methods.docstring: Quoted phrases are preserved.

methods.name: test_sanitize_hyphenated_tokens
methods.docstring: Hyphenated tokens are auto-quoted to prevent FTS5 syntax errors.

methods.name: test_sanitize_already_quoted_hyphenated
methods.docstring: Already quoted hyphenated tokens are not double-quoted.

methods.name: test_sanitize_no_hyphen_unchanged
methods.docstring: Tokens without hyphens are not modified.

classes.name: TestQuoteHyphenatedTokens
classes.docstring: Test hyphenated token quoting helper function.

methods.name: test_quote_simple_hyphenated
methods.docstring: Simple hyphenated tokens are quoted.

methods.name: test_quote_multiple_hyphens
methods.docstring: Tokens with multiple hyphens are quoted.

methods.name: test_quote_multiple_tokens
methods.docstring: Multiple hyphenated tokens in a query are all quoted.

methods.name: test_no_quote_already_quoted
methods.docstring: Already quoted tokens are not double-quoted.

methods.name: test_no_quote_no_hyphen
methods.docstring: Tokens without hyphens are unchanged.

methods.name: test_empty_and_none_input
methods.docstring: Empty string is returned as-is.

methods.name: test_no_quote_trailing_hyphen
methods.docstring: Tokens with trailing hyphens are not quoted (not valid hyphenated tokens).

classes.name: TestSQLInjectionPrevention
classes.docstring: Test SQL injection prevention in queries.

methods.name: test_search_query_sql_injection_attempt
methods.docstring: SQL injection in search query is safely handled.

methods.name: test_fts_special_characters_handled
methods.docstring: FTS special characters don't cause SQL errors.

methods.name: test_human_key_path_traversal_attempt
methods.docstring: Path traversal in human_key is handled safely.

methods.name: test_file_reservation_path_traversal
methods.docstring: Path traversal in file reservation patterns is handled.

classes.name: TestLargeInputHandling
classes.docstring: Test handling of excessively large inputs.

methods.name: test_very_long_search_query
methods.docstring: Very long search queries are handled without crash.

methods.name: test_very_long_message_body
methods.docstring: Very long message bodies are handled without crash.

methods.name: test_many_recipients
methods.docstring: Many recipients in a message are handled without crash.

methods.name: test_null_byte_in_project_key
methods.docstring: Null bytes in project key are handled safely.

methods.name: test_null_byte_in_agent_name
methods.docstring: Null bytes in agent name are handled safely.

classes.name: TestUnicodeEncodingAttacks
classes.docstring: Test Unicode and encoding attack prevention.

methods.name: test_unicode_normalization_in_search
methods.docstring: Unicode variations in search are handled correctly.

methods.name: test_utf8_overlong_encoding
methods.docstring: UTF-8 overlong encodings are handled safely.

classes.name: TestSpecialCharactersInIdentifiers
classes.docstring: Test handling of special characters in identifiers.

methods.name: test_special_chars_in_thread_id
methods.docstring: Special characters in thread_id are handled safely.

classes.name: TestXSSPrevention
classes.docstring: Test XSS prevention in message content.

methods.name: test_xss_payloads_in_fts_sanitizer
methods.docstring: XSS payloads in FTS queries don't break sanitizer.

methods.name: test_xss_in_message_body_stored_safely
methods.docstring: XSS payloads in message body are stored without execution.

classes.name: TestMalformedJSONHandling
classes.docstring: Test handling of malformed JSON in requests.

methods.name: test_deeply_nested_json
methods.docstring: Deeply nested JSON doesn't cause stack overflow.

methods.name: test_json_with_duplicate_keys
methods.docstring: JSON with duplicate keys is handled safely.
